metadata.title: Justin
metadata.description: Justin 的个人主页，包含关于、技能、项目和联系入口。

primary.subtitle: Flutter 工程师 / 22岁 / 新疆

skillsPage.metadataDescription: Justin 当前主要使用的技术栈与能力方向。
skillsPage.title: 技能
skillsPage.description: 先用静态内容固定当前主要技术栈，整体保持简约展示。后续只需要替换文案，就可以逐步补齐真实经验和案例。

projectsPage.metadataDescription: Justin 的项目卡片列表与详情入口。
projectsPage.title: 项目
projectsPage.description: 这里先放静态项目卡片，每张卡片都包含项目名、职责、技术栈、解决的问题和项目简介。点击后进入详情页查看截图、代码片段和外链入口。

contactPage.metadataDescription: Justin 的社交链接与联系入口。
contactPage.title: 联系
contactPage.description: 合作模块改成联系页，先放掘金、GitHub 和 QQ 邮箱三个入口。当前都使用静态占位内容，后续替换成真实账号即可。

projectDetail.screenshotHint: 先放占位块，后续替换为真实截图

metadata.title: Justin
metadata.description: Justin's personal site with an about page, skills, projects, and contact links.

reveal.subtitle: Flutter 工程师 / 22岁 / 新疆

skillsPage.metadataDescription: Justin's current core technologies and focus areas.
skillsPage.title: Skills
skillsPage.description: This page fixes the current stack in a clean static layout first. Later, new experience and case studies can be filled in by updating content only.

projectsPage.metadataDescription: Justin's project list and project detail entry points.
projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.description: These project cards act as a temporary portfolio layer. Each card includes the project name, role, stack, problem statement, and summary, with a deeper detail page behind it.

contactPage.metadataDescription: Justin's social profiles and contact entry points.
contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.description: The collaboration module is now a contact page with Juejin, GitHub, and QQ Mail as placeholders. You only need to replace the links later with real accounts.

projectDetail.screenshotHint: Placeholder surfaces for now. Replace them with real screenshots later.
